Query.SQL: SELECT MAX(RESULT) + 1 AS "PAYOUT_EXISTS" FROM ( SELECT COUNT(POI.PO_NUMBER) AS "RESULT" FROM PAYABLE_ORDER_ITEMS POI WHERE POI.TRANSACTION_NUMBER = ${param.transactionNumber} AND POI.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.courtCode} AND ROWNUM = 1 UNION SELECT COUNT(PO.PO_NUMBER) * 2 AS "RESULT" FROM PAYABLE_ORDER_ITEMS POI, PAYABLE_ORDERS PO WHERE POI.TRANSACTION_NUMBER = ${param.transactionNumber} AND POI.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.courtCode} AND PO.PO_NUMBER = POI.PO_NUMBER AND PO.CHECK_DIGIT IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM = 1 )
